description: Style NoteThis beautifully toned pair from catwalk are great to tone down a blingy ensemble or class up a simple monochrome theme. We love the colour patterning and overall design aesthetic of this lovely pair. Buy now before we run out of stock!    Product DetailsBrown sandals with a forefoot strap and an ankle strap with a tang claspSmooth footbed with branding on the heelPlastic outsole with textured grooves on the forefoot and a heel    Material and CarePlastic and syntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight    SizeHeel: 4.5& rdquo
